title: Create: More Sounds
description: Adds more mechanical sounds to different Create machines.
body:
Adds more mechanical sounds to different Create machines.

 

**Current blocks modified:**

- Valve (Metal squeal)

- Clutch (Toggle off and on)

- Gearshift (Toggle sound)

- Elevator Pulley (Complex system, adding send-off, arrival, and travel loop along the whole length of the cable)

- Rope Pulley (Rope sound along the entirety of the rope)

- Hose Pulley (Rope sound along the entirety of the hose)

 

Open for suggestions if you want something else added, or changed!
